tagline: We treat every customer like they were part of our family.

hero.headline: Your Family Pool Deserves Family Care
hero.subheadline: For over a decade, Tyler Pool Service has kept East Texas pools sparkling clean with the personal attention only a family-owned company can deliver. Trusted by your neighbors since 2015.
checkmarks: Advanced water chemistry for perfectly balanced pools
Responsive service — we answer in minutes, not days

services.headline: Complete Pool Care for Every Tyler Home
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to full equipment overhauls, we handle every detail so you can enjoy your pool worry-free.

cards.title: Weekly & Bi-Weekly Maintenance
cards.description: Scheduled skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and chemical balancing to keep your pool crystal clear all season long.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, filters, heaters, and more to keep your system running at peak efficiency.

cards.title: Deep Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough cleaning using advanced water chemistry techniques that deliver perfect water balance every time.

cards.title: Pool Automation
cards.description: Smart automation installation so you can control your pool equipment, lights, and features from your phone.

cards.title: Pool Inspections
cards.description: Comprehensive inspections to catch potential problems early and ensure your pool meets safety standards.

cards.title: Spa & Water Features
cards.description: Full spa maintenance plus water feature installation, plaster upgrades, and tile replacement to elevate your backyard.

steps.title: Request Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form. We'll schedule a convenient time to assess your pool's needs — no obligation.

steps.title: Get a Custom Care Plan
steps.description: We'll inspect your pool, test your water chemistry, and build a maintenance plan tailored to your pool and budget.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool, Worry-Free
steps.description: Our trained technicians handle everything on schedule. You just relax and enjoy perfectly clean, safe water.

about.label: About Tyler Pool Service
about.headline: A Family Business Built on Trust Since 2015
about.description: Tyler Pool Service was founded with a simple promise: treat every customer like family. For over 11 years, owner Cody and his team have delivered on that promise across East Texas. Every technician is thoroughly trained and closely supervised, and we use advanced water chemistry techniques that go beyond basic chlorine checks. When you call us, you get a real person who cares — and answers within minutes, not days.

features.title: Family-Owned with Hands-On Leadership
features.description: Owner Cody is personally involved in every aspect of the business, ensuring quality and accountability on every job.

features.title: Advanced Water Chemistry Expertise
features.description: We go beyond basic chlorine checks with professional-grade techniques that keep your water balanced longer and safer.

features.title: Quick-Response Customer Service
features.description: We answer questions within minutes, not days. When you call Tyler Pool Service, you get a real person who cares.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pool Care Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no long-term contracts. Just honest pricing for honest work from a family that stands behind every visit.

guarantee.headline: Our Family Promise to You
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with any service visit, we'll come back and make it right — at no extra charge. That's the family standard we hold ourselves to. Your pool is our reputation, and we protect both.

faqs.question: How often should my pool be serviced?
faqs.answer: For most Tyler-area pools, we recommend weekly service to keep water chemistry balanced and equipment running smoothly. We also offer bi-weekly plans for pools with lighter usage or covered pools.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve Tyler, TX and the surrounding East Texas communities. If you're within a reasonable drive of Tyler, give us a call — we're happy to discuss coverage.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our customers provide gate access and we handle everything while you're at work or away. We'll leave a service report after each visit so you always know what was done.

faqs.question: Can you fix my pool equipment?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We repair and service pumps, filters, heaters, automation systems, and more. If your equipment is beyond repair, we'll give you honest advice on the most cost-effective replacement options.

faqs.question: What makes your water chemistry approach different?
faqs.answer: We use advanced water chemistry techniques and professional-grade products that go well beyond basic chlorine and pH testing. This means your water stays balanced longer, your equipment lasts longer, and your pool is safer for your family.

testimonials.name: Cole Hufstedler
testimonials.text: Great service. I sent in a question about leak detection pricing and the team answered within minutes. They were incredibly helpful as the questions kept coming from my end.

testimonials.name: Michael Kelly
testimonials.text: Cody went above and beyond for our pool repairs. He got to us quickly and had us back up and running in time for our party!

testimonials.name: Judy Fernandez
testimonials.text: The best pool service! My pool is well taken care of, and if we ever have a problem or concern it is addressed and taken care of immediately.

contact.headline: Let's Keep Your Pool Perfect
contact.subtitle: Reach out today for a free pool evaluation. We respond fast — usually within minutes.

footer.description: Tyler Pool Service is a family-owned pool care company proudly serving Tyler, TX and surrounding East Texas communities since 2015. We treat every customer like family.
